rationale: The moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 candidate is the best choice because it provides a complete and natural translation of the entire document, including the complex comparison table and technical explanations. The 'current' translation and the other candidate (gpt-oss-120b) both contain a significant error: they leave a paragraph in Korean ('이 쿼리는 퍼지 이름 매치...') in the middle of the Japanese translation. Kimi-k2.6 correctly translates this section into Japanese. It also maintains Dan's direct, punchy style and preserves all MDX formatting and heading counts perfectly.
